texto: John Calvin called the Book of Psalms ‘an anatomy of all parts of the soul.’ All the range of emotions are expressed
autor: the Psalms weave an emotional fabric for the human soul. These inspired lyrics take us by the hand and train us in proper emotion. They lead us to emotional maturity.
